introSection:
Mine Cart Madness (Japanese: ドンキーコングのクレイジー・トロッコ) is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Konohana-ku, Osaka, Japan. It is based on the Donkey Kong Country franchise.

The coaster uses Universal's "Boom Coaster" patent, which simulates the coaster cars "jumping the rails".

sections.title: Layout
sections.content:
In the ride's story, the riders must board a mine cart and help Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong chase the Tiki Tak Tribe away from the Golden Temple to protect the Golden Banana.

Within the ride queue line, animatronics of Cranky Kong and Squawks the Parrot tell the riders about the ride's premises.

fullText:
Mine Cart Madness (Japanese: ドンキーコングのクレイジー・トロッコ) is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Konohana-ku, Osaka, Japan. It is based on the Donkey Kong Country franchise.

The coaster uses Universal's "Boom Coaster" patent, which simulates the coaster cars "jumping the rails".

In the ride's story, the riders must board a mine cart and help Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong chase the Tiki Tak Tribe away from the Golden Temple to protect the Golden Banana.

Within the ride queue line, animatronics of Cranky Kong and Squawks the Parrot tell the riders about the ride's premises.
